message.content:
```plantuml
@startuml
skinparam participantStyle rectangle

participant "subject" as S
participant "blockchain" as B
participant "issuer" as I

activate S
S -> B: look up issuer DID
activate B
B --> S: issuer public key
deactivate B

S <-[hidden]: encrypt request with issuer public key
S <-[hidden]: sign request with subject private key

S -> I: request credential
activate I
I -> B: look up subject DID
activate B
B --> I: subject public key
deactivate B

I <-[hidden]: validate request signature
I <-[hidden]: decrypt request with issuer private key
I <-[hidden]: validate facts of requested credential
I <-[hidden]: create Verified Credential (VC)
I <-[hidden]: sign VC with issuer private key

I --> S: verified credential
deactivate I

S <-[hidden]: store credential
deactivate S

@enduml
```
